title: Toward the Grand Line
description: On pages 30–30, toward the grand line focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.
scene: On pages 30–30, toward the grand line focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: to draw a map of the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: t... t-to become a brave warrior of the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Off to grand line we go!

summary: This part closes East Blue with a storm-driven escape and the crew’s first real step toward the Grand Line.
